title: EnderIO Continuous
description: A maintained fork of EnderIO in MC1.12.2.
body:
## What
This mod is an unofficial fork of EnderIO, specifically tailored for the 1.12.2 version. Since the official maintenance of EnderIO's 1.12.2 version has been discontinued, we've created this fork to ensure players can still enjoy a more refined experience on this version.
​
## Goal
This branch will focus on fixing various bugs in the 1.12.2 version and will also select and incorporate quality features from other EnderIO versions, striving to deliver a more exceptional gameplay experience for everyone.

## Note
In case you are looking for the original EnderIO go [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderio).

If you encounter any bugs in your playthough, please report them on the linked issue tracker, DO NOT write an issue on the original EnderIO github page.
